turns.content: Help me plan my week. I have a dentist appointment Tuesday, need to finish the API redesign by Thursday, and want to prep for the team retrospective on Friday.

📋 SUMMARY: Planning Jm's week with three key priorities.

**Week of Feb 11-15, 2026**

| Day | Focus | Details |
|-----|-------|---------|
| **Wed Feb 11** (Today) | API Redesign | Start/continue API redesign work — 2 full days before Thursday deadline |
| **Tue Feb 12** | Dentist + API | Dentist appointment; work API redesign around it |
| **Wed Feb 13** | API Redesign | Final push — aim to complete and get review by EOD |
| **Thu Feb 14** | API Deadline | API redesign due — buffer for fixes/feedback |
| **Fri Feb 15** | Retro Prep + Retro | Morning: prep talking points, gather metrics/notes; Afternoon: team retrospective |

**Retro prep checklist:**
1. Review what shipped since last retro
2. Note blockers/friction points
3. Gather any metrics or data to share
4. Draft 1-2 improvement proposals

**Suggestions:**
- Block deep work time Wed-Thu for the API redesign (minimize meetings)
- Prep retro notes Thu evening so Friday morning is just a quick review
- What time is the dentist Tuesday? That'll help slot in work blocks around it

🗣️ Kaya: Three priorities mapped across the week. Dentist Tuesday, API by Thursday, retro Friday.
